title: Central Stadium Yekaterinburg opens

fact: Yekaterinburg Arena is a football stadium in the city of Yekaterinburg in Russia.

title: Metalist Stadium opens
subtitle: Sports stadium
fact: "Metalist" Oblast Sports Complex, which includes the Metalist Stadium, is a multi-use stadium in Kharkiv, Ukraine.

title: Ak Bars Arena opens
subtitle: Sports stadium
fact: Ak Bars Arena is a stadium in Kazan, Russia.

title: Nizhny Novgorod Stadium opens
subtitle: Sports stadium
fact: Sovcombank Arena is a football stadium in Nizhny Novgorod, Russia.

title: Rostov Arena opens
subtitle: Sports stadium
fact: Rostov Arena is an association football stadium in Rostov-on-Don, Russia.

title: Estádio Couto Pereira opens
subtitle: Sports stadium
fact: Estádio Major Antônio Couto Pereira, often shortened to Couto Pereira, is the home of Coritiba Foot Ball Club, located in Curitiba, Paraná state, Brazil.

title: Volgograd Arena opens
subtitle: Sports stadium
fact: The Volgograd Arena is a football stadium in Volgograd, Russia.

title: Arena das Dunas opens
subtitle: Sports stadium
fact: The Arena das Dunas is a football stadium in Natal, Brazil.
